task_legend: scene-cls · caption · VQA · region-caption · grounding-HBB · grounding-OBB · ref-seg (pixel) · reasoning-seg · change-desc · temporal-QA · detection · retrieval · zero-shot-cls · reasoning-CoT · generation · agentic-zoom

models.name: SatMAE
models.key_idea: MAE adapted to multispectral + temporal Sentinel-2; band-group tokenization

models.name: Scale-MAE
models.key_idea: GSD-aware pos-encoding + Laplacian pyramid decoder for scale invariance

models.name: GFM
models.key_idea: Continual pretraining from ImageNet beats from-scratch at fraction of compute

models.name: CROMA
models.key_idea: Contrastive SAR-optical alignment + cross-modal reconstruction

models.name: SpectralGPT
models.key_idea: 3D spatial-spectral token generation for spectral imagery

models.name: Presto
models.key_idea: Pixel-timeseries FM; extreme efficiency for crop/land tasks

models.name: Prithvi-EO 2.0
models.key_idea: Global HLS temporal stacks; strong flood/burn/crop transfer; TerraTorch ecosystem

models.name: Clay v1.5
models.key_idea: Open, sensor-metadata-conditioned embeddings across many sensors

models.name: DOFA
models.key_idea: Dynamic weight generation from central wavelength → any band combination

models.name: MTP
models.key_idea: Multi-task pretraining (seg/det/cls) closes pretrain-downstream gap

models.name: SoftCon
models.key_idea: Multi-label-guided soft positives + cross-domain continual pretraining

models.name: SkySense
models.key_idea: Largest multi-modal RS FM of its time; geo-context prototype learning

models.name: Copernicus-FM
models.key_idea: Unified Copernicus sensors incl. atmospheric variables; metadata conditioning

models.name: TerraMind
models.key_idea: Any-to-any modality generation; Thinking-in-Modalities at inference; tops GEO-Bench-2 groups

models.name: Galileo
models.key_idea: Handles arbitrary subsets of modalities/timesteps; strong pixel-timeseries + image tasks

models.name: AlphaEarth Foundations
models.key_idea: Analysis-ready global embeddings, not a backbone; new paradigm, weak transferability/interpretability

models.name: OlmoEarth
models.key_idea: Fully open end-to-end stack (data→weights→deploy); latent-space masking objective

models.name: TerraFlow
models.key_idea: Joint multimodal-multitemporal representation learning

models.name: GeoSANE
models.key_idea: Learns from model weights, not data — generates task networks from existing FMs

models.name: GeoMeld-FM
models.key_idea: Spatially-aligned multimodal dataset + agentic captions; JEPA + contrastive hybrid objective

models.name: FLORO
models.key_idea: Ecological focus; adapts to varying sensor configs; strong on PANGAEA with small pretraining set

models.name: RSGPT
models.key_idea: Pioneer RS conversational model; proved instruction tuning works on RS

models.name: GeoRSCLIP
models.key_idea: Largest RS image-text pretraining corpus of its time

models.name: RemoteCLIP
models.datasets: 17 combined datasets (RET-3 retrieval + DET-10 detection + SEG-4 segmentation, ~165k pairs)
models.key_idea: The retrieval workhorse; cheapest RS-VLM to deploy

models.name: SkyEyeGPT
models.key_idea: Unified RS VL tasks incl. aerial video captioning via one instruction format

models.name: EarthGPT
models.key_idea: Universal multi-sensor RS MLLM — optical, SAR, infrared in one model

models.name: GeoChat
models.datasets: GeoChat-Instruct 318k (built from DOTA, DIOR, FAIR1M, NWPU, RSVQA, …)
models.key_idea: First grounded RS VLM; oriented-bbox-as-text; the field's reference recipe

models.name: LHRS-Bot
models.key_idea: VGI-enhanced alignment, multi-level vision perceiver, curriculum learning; LHRS-Bench

models.name: RS-LLaVA
models.key_idea: Joint captioning + QA with a small curated instruction set

models.name: VHM (H2RSVLM)
models.key_idea: Versatile AND honest — trained to refuse unanswerable RS questions (hallucination control)

models.name: Popeye
models.key_idea: Domain-specialist VLM: unified ship detection across optical + SAR

models.name: SkySenseGPT
models.key_idea: Scene-graph generation + relation reasoning for RS

models.name: EarthMarker
models.key_idea: Visual prompting (boxes/points as input marks) for region- and point-level comprehension

models.name: CDChat
models.key_idea: LMM fine-tuned specifically for bi-temporal change description

models.name: TEOChat
models.key_idea: First temporal-sequence EO assistant — QA over image time series

models.name: GeoLLaVA
models.key_idea: Efficient PEFT of video-VLMs (Video-LLaVA/LLaVA-NeXT) for temporal change

models.name: RS-MoE
models.datasets: RS caption/VQA sets (UCM, Sydney, RSICD, RSVQA)
models.key_idea: First MoE RS-VLM — instruction router + lightweight experts, trainable on one GPU

models.name: GeoGround
models.key_idea: Unifies box AND mask grounding via Text-Mask signal compression — no decoder needed

models.name: LHRS-Bot-Nova
models.key_idea: Improved alignment via recaptioning + MoE vision perceiver

models.name: RingMoGPT
models.key_idea: Unified vision + language + grounded tasks in the RingMo ecosystem

models.name: RSUniVLM
models.datasets: Mixed image/region/pixel sets (RSVQA, grounding, seg, change)
models.key_idea: Granularity-oriented MoE: image, region AND pixel level in one ~1B model

models.name: EarthDial
models.key_idea: Multi-spectral/temporal/resolution dialogues; the field's largest instruction corpus

models.name: GeoPix
models.key_idea: Pixel-level MLLM with class-wise learnable memory for multi-scale RS objects

models.name: GeoPixel
models.key_idea: Pixel grounding via <SEG> token + mask decoder; AnyRes up to 4K

models.name: Falcon (RS)
models.key_idea: 0.7B model, 14 tasks image→region→pixel — capability density over scale

models.name: DOFA-CLIP
models.key_idea: CLIP for ANY sensor via DOFA wavelength-conditioned encoder — text-aligned multi-sensor space

models.name: EagleVision
models.key_idea: Object-level detection + per-object attribute dialogue

models.name: OmniGeo
models.key_idea: GeoAI generalist fusing imagery with spatial/vector data

models.name: SegEarth-R1
models.key_idea: Geospatial pixel reasoning: implicit queries ('where could flooding damage crops?') → masks

models.name: EarthGPT-X
models.key_idea: Flexible visual prompting (point/box/free-form) across optical, SAR, IR

models.name: TinyRS-R1
models.key_idea: Compact 2B reasoning RS-VLM — R1-style RL at small scale

models.name: GeoLLaVA-8K
models.key_idea: First 8K-resolution RS MLLM — background token pruning + anchored compression

models.name: EarthMind
models.key_idea: Spatial attention prompting + optical-SAR fusion; multi-granular image→region→pixel

models.name: RemoteReasoner
models.key_idea: One RL-trained reasoner transforms outputs to region/pixel/object tasks without per-task fine-tuning

models.name: GeoVLM-R1
models.datasets: Reinforcement fine-tuning over EO task suites
models.key_idea: Reward-guided fine-tuning boosts structured EO reasoning across tasks

models.name: RSThinker
models.key_idea: Faithful chain-of-thought grounded in detected evidence, not confabulated steps

models.name: ZoomEarth
models.datasets: LRS-GRO style UHR annotation + zoom policies
models.key_idea: Active perception: learned cropping/zooming policy for ultra-high-res scenes

models.name: GeoZero
models.datasets: RL from scratch on geospatial scenes (no SFT CoT)
models.key_idea: R1-Zero-style: reasoning incentivized purely by RL rewards on geospatial tasks

models.name: GeoViS
models.datasets: Search-trajectory training data over large scenes
models.key_idea: Geospatially-rewarded iterative visual search (tree-structured hypothesis refinement)

models.name: SkyMoE
models.key_idea: Mixture-of-experts routing per geospatial interpretation task

models.name: SegEarth-R2
models.key_idea: Comprehensive language-guided segmentation: granularity + multiplicity + reasoning in one

models.name: EarthVL
models.key_idea: Unifies EO understanding AND text-conditioned image generation

models.name: GeoReason
models.key_idea: Aligns thinking and answering — penalizes reasoning/answer contradictions

models.name: GeoEyes
models.key_idea: On-demand visual focusing with evidence chains on ultra-high-res imagery

models.name: RemoteShield
models.key_idea: Consistent behavior under realistic perturbations via preference learning

benchmarks.name: GEO-Bench-2
benchmarks.note: Current standard; finding: no single GFM dominates

benchmarks.name: EarthSpatialBench
benchmarks.scope: Spatial reasoning: distance, direction, topology on Earth imagery
